title: Able Assess User Guide
description: A step-by-step guide to navigating the Able Assess mobile app for grip assessments, with the Quick Start Guide and full User Guide available as PDF downloads.
author: Dr Paul Rinne
excerpt: Welcome to Able Assess, the mobile platform for grip assessments. This is your step-by-step guide to help you navigate all the areas of the Able Assess App.
body:
## Able Assess User Guide

Welcome to Able Assess, the mobile platform for grip assessments. We've published two PDFs to help you navigate the app.

The **Quick Start Guide** is a short overview for first-time users.

[Open the Quick Start Guide](/downloads/Able-Assess-Quick-Start-V1.10.1.pdf)

The **User Guide** is the complete walkthrough of every screen and feature.

[Open the User Guide](/downloads/Able-Assess-User-Guide-V1.10.1.pdf)

If you have any questions please contact: [support@able-care.co](mailto:support@able-care.co)
